title: T-034 — UI: PLN-001 Planning Dashboard page (parity with prototype)
prompt:
Build PLN-001 PlanningDashboard page (Next.js App Router server component) at `src/app/(planning)/planning/page.tsx` matching the prototype `design/Monopilot Design System/planning/dashboard.jsx:3-261` 1:1.

Layout (3 bands): Band 1 PLN-001a stat tiles (open POs, pending approval, overdue, open TOs, scheduled today, in_progress, on_hold>24h). Band 2 PLN-001b grouped alerts (per §13.1). Band 3 includes PLN-001c QuickActions strip (Create PO, TO, WO, Bulk Import, Run Sequencing) and PLN-001d CascadeChainView tab.

Use shadcn primitives only. Server Component fetches data via T-027 dashboard service. Loading + empty + error states match prototype.

RED test: RTL snapshot test asserts component hierarchy matches prototype regions; Playwright e2e test loads /planning and verifies KPI tiles render.

pipeline_inputs.description: PLN-001 server-rendered page with KPI tiles, alerts, and quick actions matching dashboard prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Prototype reference: planning/dashboard.jsx:3-261 (read-only). Translation notes: window.Modal → Radix Dialog; mock states → real Server Action data; mock setTimeout → Server Action with optimistic UI; hardcoded labels → next-intl t() keys under planning.dashboard. Parity checklist (verify each in RTL test): (1) 3 bands present in same order; (2) 7 KPI tiles present in Band 1 with correct labels; (3) alerts grouped by category in Band 2; (4) Quick Actions strip shows 5 buttons in same order. Use Suspense for streaming. Cache headers: revalidate=60.
acceptance_criteria: Given the production page renders, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/planning/dashboard.jsx:3-261`, then it has the same 3 bands in the same order, the same 7 KPI tiles in Band 1, the same alert categories in Band 2, and the same 5 Quick Action buttons — verified by RTL snapshot, with the parity checklist in `pipeline_inputs.details`.
Given the dashboard endpoint returns empty arrays, when the page renders, then empty-state copy matches the prototype empty state.
Given the API returns an error, when the page renders, then the error boundary shows the same red banner copy as the prototype.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/components/planning/dashboard/__tests__/PlanningDashboard.test.tsx` and `pnpm playwright test e2e/planning/dashboard.spec.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED RTL snapshot asserting prototype parity (3 bands, 7 tiles, 5 actions).
Playwright e2e: navigate /planning, expect KPI tiles, click Create PO → wizard opens.
Run `pnpm vitest run` and `pnpm playwright test`.
risk_red_lines: Do not deviate from shadcn primitive choices in the prototype.
Do not hardcode strings — use next-intl.
Do not add new bands not in the prototype.
